docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED MAY-30-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JIAHAO
MAILING OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED: ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, GLENDY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JIAHAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, GLENDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEN, JIAHAO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF GLENDY LOPEZ & DEFENDANT JIAHOA CHEN. MARIEL FALAK, COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER, ASSISTED MS. LOPEZ AT TODAY'S HEARING. FENG CHEN WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR MR. CHEN. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY, 6/29/16. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2016 - JUDGMENT.
